de: Annex 2 - Annex on the essential terms and conditions for the administration of the anti-money laundering and the combating of financing of terrorism topical Trust Fund Subaccount  - 25-02-2014 - Vereinbarung zwischen der Schweiz, vertreten durch das SECO, und dem Internationalen Währungsfonds (IWF)betreffend eines thematischen Treuhandfonds zur Bekämpfung der Geldwäscherei und der Terrorismusfinanzierung
en: Annex 2 - Annex on the essential terms and conditions for the administration of the anti-money laundering and the combating of financing of terrorism topical Trust Fund Subaccount  - 25-02-2014 - Anti-Money Laundering and Combating the Financing of Terrorism Topical Trust Fund Subaccount, Letter of Understanding for Contribution by the Government of Switzerland
fr: Annex 2 - Annex on the essential terms and conditions for the administration of the anti-money laundering and the combating of financing of terrorism topical Trust Fund Subaccount  - 25-02-2014 - Protocole d'accord entre la Suisse, représentée par le Secrétariat d'Etat à l'économie SECO et le Fonds monétaire international (FMI) concernant un fonds fiduciaire de la lutte contre le blanchiment d'argent et le financement du terrorisme
